Warding Bond.description: +1 AC and +1 to all saving throws (concentration)

Agile Parry.description: +2 AC while holding kensei weapon (until next turn)

Arcane Deflection.description: +2 AC (reaction, single attack) and +4 to all saves (reaction, single save)

Bladesong.description: +INT AC, +10 speed, advantage on Acrobatics (1 min)

Mage Armor.description: Base AC becomes 13 + DEX (8 hours, no armor)

Barkskin.description: AC can't be less than 17 (concentration, 1 hour)

Fighting Spirit.description: 5 temp HP + advantage on attacks (bonus action, 3/long rest)

Guardian of Nature: Great Tree.description: 10 temp HP, advantage on CON saves (concentration, 1 min)

Dark One's Blessing.description: Temp HP = CHA mod + warlock level (on reducing enemy to 0 HP)

Celestial Resilience.description: Temp HP = warlock level + CHA mod (short/long rest)

Touch of Death.description: Temp HP = WIS mod + monk level (on reducing enemy to 0 HP)

Adrenaline Rush.description: Temp HP = proficiency bonus (Dash as bonus action, Orc)

Armor of Agathys.description: 5 temp HP (+5 per slot level above 1st), deals cold damage to melee attackers

False Life.description: 1d4+4 temp HP (+5 per slot level above 1st)

Heroism.description: Temp HP = spellcasting ability mod at start of each turn (concentration). Set manually

Aid.description: +5 max HP and current HP (+5 per slot level above 2nd, 8 hours)

Drunken Technique.description: +10 ft speed (Flurry of Blows, until end of turn)

Dread Ambusher.description: +10 ft speed (first turn of combat only)

Guardian of Nature: Primal Beast.description: +10 ft speed, advantage on STR attacks, +1d6 force damage (concentration, 1 min)

Ashardalon's Stride.description: +20 ft speed, deals fire damage when moving (+5 per slot above 3rd, concentration)

Zephyr Strike.description: +30 ft speed on next turn, no opportunity attacks (concentration)

Large Form.description: +10 ft speed, become Large (bonus action, 10 min, Goliath)

Haste.description: Double speed, +2 AC, advantage on DEX saves, extra action (concentration, 1 min)

Steady Aim.description: Speed becomes 0, advantage on next attack (bonus action, Rogue)

Bless.description: +1d4 to attack rolls and saving throws (concentration, 1 min). Dice bonus — apply result manually

Bear Totem Spirit.description: Resistance to all damage except Psychic while raging

Stoneskin.description: Resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage (concentration, 1 hour)

Full of Stars.description: Resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing while in Starry Form

Stormborn.description: Resistance to cold, lightning, and thunder while Wrath of Sea is active

Superior Defense.description: Resistance to all damage except Force (1 min, 3 Focus Points)

Umbral Form.description: Resistance to all damage except Force and Radiant (6 Sorcery Points)

Fiendish Resilience.description: Resistance to one chosen damage type (until next short/long rest)

Steps of Night.description: Fly speed equal to walking speed (bonus action, 1 min, Twilight Domain)

Draconic Flight.description: Fly speed equal to walking speed (bonus action, 10 min, Dragonborn)

Celestial Revelation: Wings.description: Fly speed equal to walking speed (1 min, Aasimar)

Power of the Wilds: Falcon.description: Fly speed equal to walking speed while raging (Path of Wild Heart)

Writhing Tide.description: 10 ft fly speed, hover (bonus action, 1 min, Swarmkeeper)

Rage Damage.description: +2 damage to STR melee attacks while raging (+3 at 9th, +4 at 16th)

Divine Favor.description: +1d4 radiant damage on weapon hits (concentration, 1 min)

Hunter's Mark.description: +1d6 force damage to marked target (concentration, 1 hour)

Magic Weapon.description: +1 to attack and damage (+2 at 4th-level slot, +3 at 6th, concentration, 1 hour)

Crusader's Mantle.description: +1d4 radiant damage for all allies in aura (concentration, 1 min)

Spirit Shroud.description: +1d8 damage within 10 ft (+1d8 per 2 slot levels above 3rd, concentration, 1 min)

Holy Weapon.description: +2d8 radiant damage on weapon hits (concentration, 1 hour)

Sneak Attack.description: +(level+1)/2 d6 damage once per turn (advantage or ally adjacent)

Divine Strike.description: +1d8 damage once per turn on weapon hit (+2d8 at 14th level)

Dreadful Strikes.description: +1d4 psychic damage once per turn on weapon hit (Fey Wanderer)

Mindless Rage.description: Immune to charmed and frightened while raging (Path of Berserker)

Form of Dread.description: Immune to frightened, temp HP = 1d10 + warlock level (bonus action, 1 min)

Enhance Ability.description: Advantage on one ability's checks (concentration, 1 hour)

Guidance.description: +1d4 to one ability check (cantrip, concentration). Dice bonus — apply result manually

Shield.description: +5 AC (reaction, until start of next turn)

Tasha's Otherworldly Guise.description: AC = 10 + DEX + CHA, fly 40 ft, +2d8 damage (concentration, 1 min)

Alustriel's Mooncloak.description: Half cover (+2 AC), resistance to cold/lightning/radiant (concentration, 10 min)

Tenser's Transformation.description: 50 temp HP, advantage on weapon attacks, extra attack, +2d12 force damage (concentration, 10 min)

Motivational Speech.description: 5 temp HP, advantage on WIS saves (1 min, no concentration)

Power Word Fortify.description: 120 temp HP divided among up to 6 creatures. Set amount manually

Kinetic Jaunt.description: +10 ft speed, no opportunity attacks (concentration, 1 min)

Slow.description: -2 AC, -2 DEX saves, half speed, no reactions (concentration, 1 min)

Blur.description: Disadvantage on attack rolls against you (concentration, 1 min)

Mirror Image.description: 3 duplicates absorb attacks (d6 roll: 3+ hits duplicate instead of you)

Sanctuary.description: Attackers must make WIS save or choose new target; ends if warded creature attacks (1 min)

Warding Wind.description: Ranged weapon attacks in/out have disadvantage, deafened in 10 ft radius (concentration, 10 min)

Dragon's Breath.description: Target can exhale 15-ft cone for 3d6 damage of chosen type (concentration, 1 min)

Protection from Evil and Good.description: Aberrations/Celestials/Elementals/Fey/Fiends/Undead have disadvantage on attacks; can't charm/frighten/possess (concentration, 10 min)

Protection from Energy.description: Resistance to one chosen type: Acid/Cold/Fire/Lightning/Thunder (concentration, 1 hour)

Beacon of Hope.description: Advantage on WIS saves and death saves, max healing from any spell (concentration, 1 min)

Intellect Fortress.description: Resistance to psychic damage, advantage on INT/WIS/CHA saves (concentration, 1 hour)

Fire Shield: Warm.description: Resistance to cold damage, 2d8 fire to melee attackers (10 min, no concentration)

Fire Shield: Chill.description: Resistance to fire damage, 2d8 cold to melee attackers (10 min, no concentration)

Death Ward.description: First time you drop to 0 HP, drop to 1 HP instead (8 hours, no concentration)

Freedom of Movement.description: Can't be paralyzed or restrained, ignore difficult terrain, speed can't be reduced (1 hour)

Enlarge.description: +1d4 to weapon damage, advantage on STR checks and saves (concentration, 1 min)

Reduce.description: -1d4 to weapon damage, disadvantage on STR checks and saves (concentration, 1 min)

Dispel Evil and Good.description: Celestials/Elementals/Fey/Fiends/Undead have disadvantage on attacks against you (concentration, 1 min)

Circle of Power.description: Advantage on saves vs. spells/magical effects, evasion vs. spell damage (concentration, 10 min)

Aura of Purity.description: Resistance to poison, advantage on saves vs. blinded/charmed/deafened/frightened/paralyzed/poisoned/stunned (concentration, 10 min)

Aura of Life.description: Resistance to necrotic damage, HP max can't be reduced, allies at 0 HP regain 1 HP (concentration, 10 min)

Investiture of Flame.description: Immunity to fire, resistance to cold (concentration, 10 min)

Investiture of Ice.description: Immunity to cold, resistance to fire (concentration, 10 min)

Investiture of Wind.description: Fly speed 60 ft, advantage on DEX saves, ranged attacks disadvantaged (concentration, 10 min)

Primordial Ward.description: Resistance to acid/cold/fire/lightning/thunder; reaction to gain immunity to one (concentration, 1 min)

Songal's Elemental Suffusion.description: Resistance to one chosen type: Acid/Cold/Fire/Lightning/Thunder, 4d6 pulse damage (concentration, 10 min)

Heroes' Feast.description: Immunity to frightened/poisoned, resistance to poison, advantage on WIS saves (24 hours)

Holy Aura.description: Advantage on all saves, disadvantage on attack rolls against you (concentration, 1 min)

Mind Blank.description: Immunity to psychic damage and charmed condition (24 hours)

Foresight.description: Advantage on all d20 tests, disadvantage on attacks against you (8 hours, no concentration)

Feign Death.description: Resistance to all damage except psychic, immunity to poisoned, speed 0, incapacitated (1 hour)

Shadow Blade.description: Conjured shadow sword: 2d8 psychic, finesse, light, thrown; advantage in dim light/darkness (concentration, 1 min)

Flame Blade.description: Conjured fire blade: 3d6 + ability mod fire damage as Magic action (concentration, 10 min)

Flame Arrows.description: +1d6 fire damage to ammunition (up to 12 pieces, concentration, 1 hour)

Swift Quiver.description: 2 bonus action attacks with bow/crossbow each turn (concentration, 1 min)

Fount of Moonlight.description: Resistance to radiant, +2d6 radiant to melee attacks, reaction to blind attackers (concentration, 1 hour)

Spider Climb.description: Climb speed equal to walking speed, walk on ceilings (concentration, 1 hour)

Invisibility.description: Invisible until attacking, dealing damage, or casting a spell (concentration, 1 hour)

Greater Invisibility.description: Invisible, does not break on attacking or casting (concentration, 1 min)

Protection from Poison.description: Advantage on saves vs. Poisoned, resistance to poison damage (1 hour)

Blink.description: 50% chance to vanish to Ethereal Plane at end of each turn (1 min)

Polymorph.description: Transform into a Beast of CR ≤ your level (concentration, 1 hour)

Gaseous Form.description: Become a misty cloud, fly speed 10 ft, can pass through tiny gaps (concentration, 1 hour)

Alter Self.description: Aquatic adaptation (swim speed + gills), change appearance, or natural weapons 1d6 (concentration, 10 min)

Levitate.description: Rise 20 ft and hover, move only by pushing/pulling (concentration, 10 min)

Jump.description: Jump up to 30 ft by spending 10 ft of movement (1 min)

Feather Fall.description: Up to 5 creatures descend at 60 ft/round, no fall damage (1 min)

Water Breathing.description: Up to 10 creatures can breathe underwater (24 hours)

Water Walk.description: Up to 10 creatures can walk on liquid surfaces (1 hour)

Expeditious Retreat.description: Dash as bonus action each turn (concentration, 10 min)

Borrowed Knowledge.description: Gain proficiency in one skill you lack (1 hour)

Skill Empowerment.description: Gain Expertise (double proficiency) in one skill you're proficient in (concentration, 1 hour)

Fortune's Favor.description: One-time extra d20 on attack, check, or save — choose which to use

Nondetection.description: Can't be targeted by Divination spells or magical scrying (8 hours)

Grappled.description: Speed is 0, can't benefit from speed bonuses

Restrained.description: Speed is 0, disadvantage on attacks and DEX saves, attacks against have advantage

Paralyzed.description: Incapacitated, speed 0, auto-fail STR/DEX saves, attacks have advantage, melee hits are crits

Stunned.description: Incapacitated, speed 0, auto-fail STR/DEX saves, attacks have advantage

Petrified.description: Incapacitated, speed 0, auto-fail STR/DEX saves, resistance to all damage

Unconscious.description: Incapacitated, speed 0, auto-fail STR/DEX saves, attacks have advantage, melee hits are crits

Prone.description: Disadvantage on attacks, melee attacks have advantage, ranged have disadvantage. Half movement to stand

Blinded.description: Can't see, auto-fail checks requiring sight, attacks have disadvantage, attacks against have advantage

Charmed.description: Can't attack the charmer, charmer has advantage on social checks

Deafened.description: Can't hear, auto-fail checks requiring hearing

Frightened.description: Disadvantage on ability checks and attacks while source of fear is in line of sight

Invisible.description: Attacks have advantage, attacks against have disadvantage

Poisoned.description: Disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks

Exhaustion 2.description: Disadvantage on ability checks, speed halved

Exhaustion 3.description: Disadvantage on ability checks, attacks, and saves, speed halved

Exhaustion 4.description: Disadvantage on ability checks, attacks, and saves, speed and max HP halved

Exhaustion 5.description: Disadvantage on ability checks, attacks, and saves, speed 0, max HP halved
